Humans are one of the most common and widespread species in the Overworld. Prone to building, crafting, and settling, you can find them in villages in every corner.
origin.townstead_origins.origin.overworl: Born under the open sky, the Overworlders are a common type of human found on the surface. They are generally welcoming, and love to trade and explore.
gene.townstead_origins.diurnal.desc: Awake by day, asleep by night.
gene.townstead_origins.human_lifespan.de: Ages and matures at the ordinary human pace.
